title: polyscias floccosa
intro: Polyscias floccosa, also known as the woolly Polyscias or hairy Polyscias, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Polyscias floccosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
